name: KidzDev Unity Google Sheet Importer
description: Editor tool for importing data from Google Sheets into Unity. Fetches rows via the Sheets API v4, maps columns to C# fields via reflection, and writes them as JSON files or ScriptableObject assets.

name: KidzDev Unity Audio
description: Production-grade BGM/SFX/Ambience audio service. UniTask async, AudioMixer-backed with dB conversion, cancellable crossfades, pooled sources, plug-in clip loader (Resources default, optional Addressables adapter), and plug-in volume store.

name: KidzDev Unity Extensions
description: Handy C# / Unity extension methods — strings, collections, arrays, dictionaries, and more.

name: KidzDev Unity Local Save
description: Generic on-disk persistence for any [Serializable] type. JSON + optional Base64, atomic + durable writes, automatic backup-on-corrupt recovery, injectable storage/serializer seams. Zero external dependencies.

name: KidzDev Unity Localization
description: Lightweight localization system with UniTask async loading. Supports JSON and ScriptableObject data sources, plug-in custom loaders, and auto-refreshing TMP_Text components.

name: KidzDev Unity Popup
description: Modal dialogs for Unity you await for a typed result — ShowAsync<TResult>(), stacked popups, async transitions, and a per-popup loader split (Resources / Direct / Addressables). UniTask-only, Addressables stays optional, zero singleton coupling.

name: KidzDev Unity Profanity
description: Production-grade multilingual profanity filter. Obfuscation-aware engine (leetspeak, separators, repeat-collapse), allowlist for false-positive prevention, plug-in data loader (Resources default, optional Addressables adapter). Supports English and Thai out of the box.

name: KidzDev Unity Recyclable Scroll
description: High-performance recyclable ScrollRect for Unity uGUI — object pooling, linear & loop modes, variable item sizes, sync/async item loading.

name: KidzDev Unity Chat View
description: In-game chat UI on the recyclable-scroll engine — multi-channel feed, text/sticker bubbles, inline emote shortcodes, reply-jump-to-source, new-message pill, backward pagination, and a compose box with a mute/rate-limit gate.

name: KidzDev Unity Responsive Fit
description: Responsive item sizing for Unity uGUI — fit scroll/grid items to any screen (items-per-view, aspect ratio, fixed columns, safe area).

name: KidzDev Unity Safe Area
description: Two complementary notch / safe-area components for Unity uGUI. SafeArea shrinks a RectTransform to fit inside the device safe area; SafeAreaOutsideMask fills the region outside it with colour bars. Both share one change-tracking core, honour an in-editor device simulator (iPhone X/Xs Max, Pixel 3 XL), guard against Samsung first-frame NaN, and support per-axis ConformX/ConformY control.

name: KidzDev Unity Scroll Snap
description: ScrollRect-based snap pager for Unity uGUI — horizontal and vertical axes, dot indicators, number indicators, and prev/next navigation.

name: KidzDev Unity Screen Navigator
description: Stack-based UI/scene navigation for Unity — push/pop history with a back button, async transitions, and an injectable animation seam. UniTask-only, zero singleton coupling.

name: KidzDev Unity State Machine
description: Production-grade state machine for Unity — synchronous and UniTask-async flavors, optional transition graph with per-edge guards, QueueLatest policy for button-mash safety, and no-state-collapse guarantees.

name: KidzDev Unity Text Scroll
description: Animated text for uGUI/TMPro: marquee ticker, credits roll, auto-fit overflow scrolling, typewriter character reveal, and a count-up number roller. Independent component families, no shared dependency beyond TMPro.

name: KidzDev Unity UI Overlay
description: Loading panels (fullscreen / progress / spinner) and a ref-counted input blocker for Unity. Imperative Show()/Hide() handles, no awaited result, sits above whatever screen or popup is showing. UniTask-only, no DOTween, no Addressables dependency.

name: KidzDev Unity Addressables Toolkit
description: Utilities for working with Unity Addressables.

name: KidzDev Unity Analytics
description: Minimal analytics event-logging facade. Validates event/parameter names against Firebase Analytics limits before dispatch, buffers events logged before initialization, and warns (instead of silently dropping) on violations. Core has zero dependencies; the Firebase adapter ships as an optional sample.

name: KidzDev Unity Grid
description: 2D/3D grid system: pure-C# per-cell data storage, A* pathfinding, multi-cell footprint placement, and nearest-available-cell search, plus a thin Unity layer for world/cell conversion and mouse/touch picking. Not a Tilemap replacement — an optional adapter aligns it to an existing UnityEngine.Grid when one is used for rendering. Zero external dependencies.

name: KidzDev Unity Singleton
description: Generic singleton bases: thread-safe plain C# Singleton<T>, auto-creating MonoSingleton<T>, and non-creating SceneSingleton<T>. Handles the MonoBehaviour lifecycle pitfalls (quit-teardown resurrection, domain-reload staleness, duplicate detection, DDOL placement) so consumers don't have to. Zero external dependencies.

name: KidzDev Unity Sliced Fill Image
description: Fixes Unity's Image.Type.Filled + Type.Sliced clipping bug with a mesh-correct SlicedFilledImage, so 9-sliced borders stay fixed-size at any fill amount. Zero dependencies beyond uGUI.

name: KidzDev Unity UI Animation
description: A UI tweening toolkit for uGUI: fade/scale/move/punch/shake/color extension methods, a designer-facing step-sequence player, and button press feedback. No third-party animation dependency by default; an optional DOTween-backed driver auto-compiles when DOTween is already installed in the consumer's project.
